'''Gyran''' was a male [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who worked for [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]].

Gyran was a former royal bodyguard to one of the spice lords of [[Sevarcos II]] until Prince [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]] "purchased" his services while on a business trip. After visiting several new worlds while working for Black Sun, he developed a mild form of agoraphobia, fear of wide open places. He owned a ship, the ''[[Arc Razor]]'', which served as his personal means of transportation.

He and his team were responsible for tracking down the [[Barani List]] to the planet [[Sedri/Legends|Sedri]].
